districts.name: Tide Gate
districts.summary: Pilots sing arrivals through shell arches while customs clerks race the returning water.
districts.featureDescription: Different shells ring according to which hidden channel is currently honest.

districts.name: Low-Tide Exchange
districts.summary: Cargo, pearls, favors, and sung contracts trade hands on ground available for one hour.
districts.featureDescription: One pan holds goods; the other fills slowly with seawater and urgency.

districts.name: Notation Quay
districts.summary: Sound-ink pilots paint routes on black boards between workshops full of tuned hulls.
districts.featureDescription: Wave notes rewrite themselves as ships choose channels offshore.

landmarks.name: the drowned argument bell
landmarks.description: A bronze bell below the tide rings whenever two ships disagree about right of way.
